title: The Beginner's Path
description: Survival Modpack for new Minecraft players and architects.
body:
### This is a modpack designed for new minecraft players and architects!
### The focus is on providing an elegant atmosphere for playing and a variety of building materials.

# Major content
### 1. Well-designed tour atmosphere, music/weather/season/sea waves/fog .....
Game immersion is greatly improved.

### About Seasonal Mod, 

At the author's request;

The ModPack is free to add this mod, but with the original mod source indicated.

You can access the mod's original release page via the following two links.

[McMod[China Site Release Page]](https://www.mcmod.cn/class/16860.html)

[CurseForge](https://www.curseforge.com/minecraft/mc-mods/ecliptic-seasons)


### 2. Large amount of building materials
Players are free to build their own buildings without being bothered by the lack of certain materials.

### 3. No heavy technology content, no restricted survival routes
Everything is free, just like the vanilla version, you can explore the world on your own, no matter if you have played other minecraft modpacks or not, you can easily get a good playing experience.

### 4. Carefully selected terrain modification mods
In order to strike a balance between beautiful scenery and survival-friendliness, the modpack has added several terrain mods
